ddls:
CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "alert_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "tactic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tactic associated with the alert */,
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the severity level of the alert */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the detection service provider */,
  "detection_service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the detection service that generated the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., Open, In Progress, Resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_detection_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("detection_service_id") REFERENCES detection_services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_tactic_id FOREIGN KEY ("tactic_id") REFERENCES tactics ("tactic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_severity_id FOREIGN KEY ("severity_id") REFERENCES severity_levels ("severity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tactics" (
  "tactic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tactic */,
  "tactic_name" TEXT /* Name of the tactic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tactic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tactic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "severity_levels" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "severity_name" TEXT /* Name of the severity level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "detection_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detection service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the detection service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the detection service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., security analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_response_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident response plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response record */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert being responded to */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident response plan being executed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the response */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the response was executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_responses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_responses_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES incident_response_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_responses_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_severity_tracking" (
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking record */,
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the severity level being tracked */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the count was recorded */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of alerts with this severity level at the timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert history record */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert associated with this history record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was taken */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Description of the action taken on the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the action */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the action taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_history_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert associated with this tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_tags_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_correlations" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary alert */,
  "related_alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related alert */,
  "correlation_type" TEXT /* Type of correlation (e.g., causality, similarity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_correlations_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_correlations_related_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., server, workstation) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_impact_assessment" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert being assessed */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset affected by the alert */,
  "impact_level" TEXT /* Level of impact (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the impact assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_impact_assessment_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_impact_assessment_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES system_assets ("asset_id")
)
